resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a strong password for your account.

plans.proFeatureDesc: {feature} is a Pro feature. Unlock it and everything else below.

staff.saveCredentialsWarning: Save these credentials now — the password won't be shown again.
staff.roleKitchenDesc: Can view & update order status in Kitchen view (accept, prepare, ready)
staff.roleCashierDesc: Can mark orders as paid and handle payments
staff.roleWaiterDesc: Can create & manage orders from tables

trialWall.title: Your trial has ended

trialWall.proTagline: For restaurants running their full operation digitally.
trialWall.checkoutError: Could not start checkout. Please try again or contact support.

billingModal.title: Manage billing

impersonateModal.title: Impersonate restaurant
impersonateModal.warning: You are about to view {name} as their admin. This will open their dashboard in a new tab using their restaurant context.
impersonateModal.info: You will still be logged in as yourself — this just navigates to their slug-based order URL for reference.

toggleModal.confirmText: Are you sure you want to {action} {name}?
toggleModal.deactivateInfo: This user will not be able to log in until reactivated.
toggleModal.reactivateInfo: This user will regain access to their account.

resetModal.title: Send password reset
resetModal.confirmText: Send a password reset email to {email}?
resetModal.infoText: They will receive a link to set a new password. The link expires in 24 hours.

expireModal.title: Mark as expired
expireModal.infoText: Their plan will be set to expired and they will be redirected to the trial wall immediately on next login.

password.title: Password

pricing.title: Pricing configuration
pricing.desc: Set prices per billing type. Used for MRR calculations on the dashboard.

pricing.lsDesc: Auto billing — customer pays online, webhook handles it

appConfig.title: App-wide configuration

appConfig.warningDaysHint: Highlight expiring plans on dashboard within this window.

restaurantInvoice.scanHint: Scan with Bakong app to pay

subscriptionGate.title: Subscription expired

subscriptionGate.generateDesc: We'll calculate your invoice based on your current plan and order volume.
subscriptionGate.scanAndPay: Scan this KHQR with Bakong app to pay

subscriptionGate.rejectedDesc: The admin rejected your proof. Upload a new, clearer screenshot.
subscriptionGate.footer: Need help? Contact the restaurant platform admin.
